methodology.summary: The Patch baseline values are reviewed against major public community trackers and normalized into one consistent list for our tools.
notes: High-tier no-potion pets can be worth more than their Fly Ride versions.
Values move faster than wiki data, so demand and trend matter alongside raw numbers.
The calculator is a benchmark tool, not a guarantee that every server will trade at the same price.

pets.name: Bat Dragon
pets.notes: Revalidated on April 9, 2026 against live public value pages. Bat Dragon remains ahead of Shadow Dragon and keeps the strongest base lane in the current benchmark set.

pets.name: Shadow Dragon
pets.notes: Revalidated on April 9, 2026 against live public value pages. Shadow Dragon stays one of the two strongest benchmark pets, but currently below Bat Dragon.

pets.name: Giraffe
pets.notes: Demand remains strong and usually outpaces many other old-event legends.

pets.name: Frost Dragon
pets.notes: One of the safest benchmark pets for mid-to-high tier trades.

pets.name: Owl
pets.notes: Revalidated on April 9, 2026 against live public value pages. Owl demand stays unusually sticky because players love the design as much as the rarity.

pets.name: Parrot
pets.notes: Revalidated on April 9, 2026 against live public value pages. Parrot remains a strong liquidity pet that is easier to move than many similarly priced legends.

pets.name: Crow
pets.notes: Revalidated on April 9, 2026 against live public value pages. Crow still trades faster than raw value alone suggests because of stable trader demand.

pets.name: Evil Unicorn
pets.notes: A classic Halloween benchmark that stays liquid year-round.

pets.name: Hedgehog
pets.notes: Cute-demand keeps this one stronger than many players expect from its rarity.

pets.name: Blazing Lion
pets.notes: Premium recent legend with strong collector demand but slightly wider price swings.

pets.name: Dalmatian
pets.notes: Still one of the most trusted mid-tier benchmarks because supply is old and stable.

pets.name: Arctic Reindeer
pets.notes: A dependable benchmark in upgrades toward crow-tier trades.

pets.name: Cow
pets.notes: Demand is consistently stronger than many rarer pets because of player preference.

pets.name: Turtle
pets.notes: Still one of the most useful stepping-stone pets for real trades.

pets.name: Chocolate Chip Bat Dragon
pets.notes: Popular design, but newer supply keeps it more volatile than old-event benchmarks.

pets.name: Kangaroo
pets.notes: A common add in turtle-tier trades and still a useful benchmark.

pets.name: Unicorn
pets.notes: Tightened on April 9, 2026 after the calculator audit showed the old Patch number lagging live public market trackers too far.

pets.name: Dragon
pets.notes: Updated on April 9, 2026 so the entry-tier benchmark stays closer to live tracker consensus instead of the older underpriced Patch value.
Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Frost Fury is still one of the sturdier older event dragons in the mid tier.
pets.name: Frost Fury

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Candicorn is much stronger than older stale lists suggest and deserves a real mid-tier lane.
pets.name: Candicorn

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Arctic Fox keeps outperforming basic rarity-first expectations because old supply and collector demand still matter.
pets.name: Arctic Fox

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Lavender Dragon stays relevant because it is recognizable, limited, and easier to move than many low-end legends.
pets.name: Lavender Dragon

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Queen Bee still carries more weight than basic permanent-pool legends, but it is not as liquid as the stronger collector lanes.
pets.name: Queen Bee

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Phoenix remains one of the better mythic-era legends, especially for players building through practical mid-tier adds.
pets.name: Phoenix

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Dodo is still a familiar fossil-era ladder pet, but demand is steadier than explosive.
pets.name: Dodo

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Shark remains a practical compare point for other lower mid legends that players still trade often.
pets.name: Shark

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Octopus is close to Shark in practice, which makes it useful for side-by-side value checks.
pets.name: Octopus

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Cerberus still has name recognition, but its real market lane is much lower than myth-based value lists imply.
pets.name: Cerberus

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. King Bee is a familiar lower-mid legend that works well as a comparison point for other permanent-pool pets.
pets.name: King Bee

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Capybara keeps overperforming its rarity because players love it and old supply is limited.
pets.name: Capybara

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Chicken is one of the clearest examples of a low-rarity pet staying relevant because demand is real.
pets.name: Chicken

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Kitsune is still widely recognized, but its value lane is more modest than many casual traders expect.
pets.name: Kitsune

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Alicorn sits in the practical low-legend range and works best as a compare point, not a premium hold.
pets.name: Alicorn

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Griffin is still highly recognizable, but demand is soft and the trade lane is weaker than nostalgia suggests.
pets.name: Griffin

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Horse is a useful low-tier compare page because it is familiar and shows how much potion lanes can matter at the bottom of the board.
pets.name: Horse

pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 9, 2026. Koala remains one of the better-known aussie-era adds, but it stays in the lower-value lane.
pets.name: Koala
Mini Pig
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Mini Pig has become one of the stronger modern collector pets and regularly beats older expectation-based lists.

pets.name: Monkey King
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Monkey King still carries strong collector demand and clean prestige compared with many older event legends.

pets.name: Flamingo
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Flamingo remains one of the strongest older ultra-rares because collector demand is deep and easy to understand.

pets.name: Elephant
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Elephant keeps outperforming its rarity tag because old supply and player preference are both real.

pets.name: Albino Monkey
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Albino Monkey still sits above many practical mid legends because of event identity and steady collector demand.

pets.name: Crocodile
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Crocodile stays strong because it is both old and immediately recognizable in trading.

pets.name: Lion
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Lion holds a cleaner lane than many older non-dragon collector pets thanks to strong identity and decent liquidity.

pets.name: Blue Dog
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Blue Dog is still one of the clearest examples of rarity mattering less than age, demand, and collector prestige.

pets.name: Pig
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Pig keeps climbing out of the casual-trader blind spot because nostalgia demand is real.

pets.name: Pink Cat
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Pink Cat still gets collector attention because of age and its place in early Adopt Me history.

pets.name: Hyena
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Hyena benefits from old supply and a quirky identity that players genuinely remember.

pets.name: Brown Bear
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Brown Bear is a stable collector rare that works well as a middle-of-the-board compare point.

pets.name: Polar Bear
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Polar Bear stays tradable because winter collector pets are easy for players to remember and compare.

pets.name: Platypus
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Platypus keeps outperforming simpler rarity logic because players actually like it and supply is old.

pets.name: Golden Penguin
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Golden Penguin is still a recognizable premium-era legend, but the real trade lane is more grounded than hype-era lists suggest.

pets.name: Rhino
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Rhino is a good old-school compare point for smaller adds and low-end collector packages.

pets.name: Skele-Rex
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Skele-Rex still gets attention because players remember it, but the market lane is much calmer than peak event hype.

pets.name: Black Panther
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Black Panther is a nice example of a low-rarity collector pet staying useful because the demand story is clear.

pets.name: T-Rex
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. T-Rex remains a familiar fossil-era legend and a practical page for lower-mid bundle math.

pets.name: Snow Owl
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Snow Owl is still common in trading, but the lane is softer than many winter nostalgia lists imply.

pets.name: African Wild Dog
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. African Wild Dog has become one of the strongest modern collector ultra-rares and still commands real attention.

pets.name: Balloon Unicorn
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Balloon Unicorn is trading like a premium modern legend and deserves a high-signal landing page.

pets.name: Giant Panda
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Giant Panda has held a strikingly strong lane for a modern release and is worth tracking directly.

pets.name: Orchid Butterfly
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Orchid Butterfly remains one of the most valuable butterfly pets and still has strong collector demand.

pets.name: Diamond Butterfly
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Diamond Butterfly still trades like a premium collector legend even after the initial spotlight faded.

pets.name: Pelican
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Pelican is a modern collector ultra-rare with stronger real demand than many casual lists assume.

pets.name: Strawberry Shortcake Bat Dragon
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Strawberry Shortcake Bat Dragon still has strong name recognition and a healthy collector lane.

pets.name: Peppermint Penguin
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Peppermint Penguin has held onto a strong winter collector lane and keeps showing up in real offers.

pets.name: Hot Doggo
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Hot Doggo remains one of the more valuable modern joke-design pets because demand is very real.

pets.name: Goose
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Goose has become a very practical collector rare because players know and actively want it.

pets.name: Caterpillar
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Caterpillar keeps outperforming simple rarity logic because the pet is memorable and demand has held up.

pets.name: Candyfloss Chick
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Candyfloss Chick is proving much stronger than a typical newer legend and deserves its own search page.

pets.name: Border Collie
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Border Collie is one of the better modern rare pages to watch because player preference is easy to see.

pets.name: Fairy Bat Dragon
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Fairy Bat Dragon still carries notable interest thanks to the design and dragon branding.

pets.name: Undead Jousting Horse
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Undead Jousting Horse remains a useful premium-halloween legend reference with better demand than many peers.

pets.name: Frost Unicorn
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Frost Unicorn is one of the stronger newer unicorn-themed legends and keeps a healthy collector lane.

pets.name: Goat
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Goat stays relevant because the pet is recognizable, limited, and genuinely liked by players.

pets.name: Alpaca
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Alpaca has carved out a strong modern collector lane and is worth tracking directly.

pets.name: Bush Elephant
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Bush Elephant is trading above many comparable modern legends because the design and demand are both strong.

pets.name: Field Mouse
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Field Mouse has stayed relevant because it is cute, limited, and easy for players to value.

pets.name: Cactus Friend
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Cactus Friend is lower on the board than many newer collector pets, but it is still recognizable enough to justify a dedicated page.

pets.name: Cryptid
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Cryptid is already trading like a real upper-mid benchmark and is one of the strongest current modern pets not tied to the old legacy tier.

pets.name: Haetae
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Haetae has settled into a strong modern collector lane with enough demand to merit direct comparisons against established upper-mid pets.

pets.name: Cabbit
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Cabbit has become one of the cleanest modern collector pets to watch because the design and event identity still matter in real trades.

pets.name: Velocirooster
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Velocirooster is a timely search target and already carries enough demand to justify a dedicated page.

pets.name: Mermicorn
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Mermicorn is holding value like a meaningful modern collector legend rather than a disposable seasonal release.

pets.name: Jekyll Hydra
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Jekyll Hydra still has enough collector heat to outperform many similarly priced modern legends.

pets.name: Sugar Glider
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Sugar Glider has one of the healthiest modern ultra-rare lanes and gets searched enough to deserve direct coverage.

pets.name: Silverback Gorilla
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Silverback Gorilla is a solid modern legend compare page because it is familiar and the lane is stable enough to read cleanly.

pets.name: Winged Tiger
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Winged Tiger remains a useful modern legend reference because the pet is recognizable and still actively traded.

pets.name: Frostbite Bear
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Frostbite Bear has held its winter collector appeal better than many comparable themed legends.

pets.name: Siamese Cat
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Siamese Cat continues to benefit from strong player preference and a clean collector lane.

pets.name: Dragonfruit Fox
pets.notes: Tracker-reviewed on April 10, 2026. Dragonfruit Fox is still one of the most memorable newer egg legends and is worth covering directly.
